relay_text: Operator suspects unexplored rate-attack vectors beyond current Wyner-Ziv/DP1/procedural-codebook/null-space set; spawned rate-attack memo worker 019e3cd7-fc54-7af1-9493-3445c4ae63f4 to evaluate scorer-feature-space, contest-video-as-codebook, decoder-side search, cross-archive pooling, ZIP/min-header, and dead-byte audit vectors as top-priority Codex goal-loop inputs.

Rate-attack research expanded from 13 to 43 vectors. New high-signal additions: YUV-native scorer representation, hardware-codec deterministic byte derivation, PoseNet Hydra unused dims 7-12, SegNet non-argmax logits, and CPU-vs-GPU leaderboard asymmetry. Spawned Dirac 019e3ce0-d68f-76f2-9191-0c0496a5cf23 for 29-vector YUV/hardware deep memo and Kuhn 019e3ce2-8f88-70f2-a866-2048654cbad9 for STRUCTURAL INFORMATION NOT SHIPPED meta-paradigm. Registered RATE-OP-1/2/3 plus process blocker tasks in canonical_task_status as prediction_only, no score claim.

B1 Phase 1 probe machinery landed but is blocked from Phase 2 authority: canonical upstream/videos/0.mkv is HEVC/YUV420p, not AV1; local CPU decode now uses evaluator AVVideoDataset conversion; T4 DALI/CUDA identity and rendered-frontier query custody are required. Separate xhigh audit found over-conservative authority bottlenecks for A1/deterministic-packet paths: exact-readiness only accepts PR101 runtime-consumption proof, strict-scorer scan is raw-token-based, byte-floor dispatch veto ignores distortion improvement, and autopilot lacks no-score timing-smoke/replay authority.

F1 direct Hydra dims 7:12 remains blocked as internal scorer-output only; corrected F1-as-A2 physical RGB perturbation probe produced local CPU capacity signal on pair 0: accepted_bits_per_pair=110, pose_0_5_rmse=4.727e-06, seg_delta=0.0. Authority remains local mechanism only: score_claim=false, promotion=false, dispatch=false until charged archive grammar + runtime consumption proof + paired CPU/CUDA exact eval.

Correction to relay_20260519T020748Z_8d1f07df48a1: do NOT interpret accepted_bits_per_pair as payload bits. The corrected F1-as-A2 probe now reports changed_rgb_values_per_pair=110 and recovered_payload_bits_per_pair=0. Direct Hydra dim 7:12 channel has separate blocking DEFER f1_direct_hydra_dim_channel_blocked_20260519T021330Z. Current corrected advisory row is f1_as_a2_rgb_invariance_20260519T021450Z with probe_kind=in_memory_rgb_tensor_invariance_signal, measurement_axis=[macOS-CPU advisory].

Wire-in #2 verification closed: per_byte_sensitivity_consumer auto-discovers and is runtime-invoked by cathedral_autopilot; hooks [1,3,4]; live FEC6 probe emits axis_tag=[macOS-CPU advisory], predicted_delta_adjustment=0.0, promotable=false, enclosing payload score_claim=false/promotion=false/ready_for_exact_eval_dispatch=false. Also corrected stale test wording: live production consumer floor is 22, not stale 23.

Closed xhigh audit P1/P2 authority findings: FEC6 CPU writeup no longer claims GHA without a GHA artifact; procedural-generation score-bearing gate now requires archive_seeded or weight_derived, with runtime_constant allowed only under explicit ruling + non-payload proof; stale deterministic compiler refs updated to tac.packet_compiler.deterministic_compiler.compile_packet(...). check_tac_terminology now guards all three regressions.
